calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tim Dewitt for and with Edward Sanders Jr.

Mr. Dewitt stated that there was a declaration that was submitted by Mr. Smith which answered all the questions. The Court stated that the problem was that the decedent drafted a will which stated he was a resident of Marin County. Mr. Dewitt stated that Mr. Kamebuchi's business was in San Francisco and that is where he resided. The Court inquired as to where Mr. Kamebuchi voted. Mr. Sanders stated that he voted in San Francisco. The Court granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open court).

Judge: Raymond Arata Jr. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Continued To Jan-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Denied
